name: Turkey Tetrazinni
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 1/2 cups mixed frozen peas and carrots, thawed
2 tablespoons snipped fresh parsley or 1 1/2 dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles, uncovered, in boiling water for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Drain.
2. Combine soup, milk, water, and cheddar cheese in a 3-quart saucepan. Cook and stir over medium heat until cheese melts and sauce is hot.
3. Stir in cooked noodles, turkey, peas, carrots, and pimiento.
4. Spoon mixture into greased 11 3/4" x 7 1/2" baking dish.
5. Combine crumbs, parmesan cheese, and parsley. Sprinkle over top.
6. Bake, uncovered, in a 375 degree oven for 30 minutes or until hot.
